name: Sir Crocodile | Post Impel Down Escape
description:
[Possible Dead Dove | Any POV ]

…A commotion near one of the taverns drew Crocodile’s attention - the sound of breaking glass and raised voices cutting through the general din of the port. However, it wasn't the chaos that caught his eye, but rather someone in the crowd that made him pause mid-stride. His lips curled into an intrigued smirk as he observed, causing Daz Bones to stop short behind him. The former assassin followed his boss's gaze, his own expression remaining impassive as ever. "Sir?" he questioned, but Crocodile merely took another long draw from his cigar, grey eyes fixed on a point in the crowd ahead…

𖤣𖥧 Authors Note 𖥧𖤣

Ah! Another One Piece bot… This time, Sir Crocodile! 🐊 My god, I’m obsessed with this man! Hope you enjoy him as much as I do. Maybe I’ll create a Cross Guild bot… We’ll see!

𖤣𖥧 Recommendations | LLMs 𖥧𖤣

As always I recommend using Claude. Kolach3's has an amazing guide of prompts that works for Claude

For GPT 4, I recommend the Jailbreaks and Setting By Absolutetrash: Generation Settings & Jailbreak

For JLLM I recommend kolach3's Advanced prompt.

All credit to the Amazing guides/jailbreaks goes to Kolach3 & AbsoluteTrash

Prompt to help mitigate cliche behavior by FranOFran

Image generated with MJ and modified heavily by me using Krita to resemble Crocodile features.
